task_completion.description: Log into the Oscar EMR system using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Oscar EMR login screen with 'oscardoc' entered, or the main dashboard indicating a successful login as the admin.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Branch/Location administration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Administration panel, specifically a section or form for adding/managing 'Branch', 'Location', or 'Clinic' settings.
Screenshots showing 'West End Clinic' typed into the Name or Branch Name field of the creation form.
Screenshots showing '880 West Drive' in the street address field, 'Toronto' in the city field, and 'ON' in the province field.

task_completion.description: Enter the clinic's phone and fax numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing '416-555-9000' in the phone field and '416-555-9001' in the fax field.

task_completion.description: Save the new satellite clinic location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the form being submitted (clicking Save/Add), a success confirmation message, or the 'West End Clinic' appearing in the list of saved branches/locations.

integrity.description: The agent must use a web browser to interact with the Oscar EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Firefox or Chrome) navigating to localhost:8080, rather than API testing tools or terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent must not bypass the UI by directly inserting data into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows executing MySQL/SQL commands to insert the clinic data directly into the backend.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the genuine Oscar EMR interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visuals should match the standard Oscar EMR web interface, not a text editor, a locally created mock HTML file, or a script file containing the target data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: OSCAR EMR is accessed via http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp or http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.do. The required admin credentials are Username: oscardoc, Password: oscar, PIN: 1117. The target data to be entered in the Branch/Location form is exactly: Name: 'West End Clinic', Address: '880 West Drive', City: 'Toronto', Province: 'ON', Phone: '416-555-9000', Fax: '416-555-9001'.
